meaning: adv.舒适温暖地,整洁地,尚可的,贴身地,隐蔽地
examples: I left the children tucked up snugly in bed.
The little town nestles snugly at the foot of the hill.
Swaddling is a technique used on babies in which a caregiver wraps the infant snugly.
Coloured lights frame the cash-only bar and a miniature courtyard fits snugly between front and back room seating areas.
